parameters.content:
## INPUT (short)

Required:
- `text`: noi dung can TTS

Optional (default):
- `mode` = `auto` (`sentence`|`fullText`)
- `voiceId` = auto resolve qua `GET /voices` neu rong
- `maxCharsChunk` = `256`
- `batchSize` = `1`
- `retry` = `2`
- `requestTimeoutSec` = `120`
- `joinMode` = `silence`
- `silenceSeconds` = `0.15`
- `crossfadeSeconds` = `0`
- `ttsApiBaseUrl` = `http://127.0.0.1:8001`

Chi dung camelCase (khong ho tro snake_case).

## CHUNK RULE

`fullText` mode (text-only chunk):
1) paragraph by newline
2) sentence by `(?<=[.!?…])\s+`
3) if sentence > max: fallback by `(?<=[,;:\-–—])\s+`
4) if still > max: fallback by words

`sentence` mode: keep full text as single chunk

## EXECUTION

- Tach `chunks` thanh items
- Loop qua `chunksTotal` bang `Split in Batches`
- Moi vong goi `POST /stream` cho 1 chunk
- Retry/backoff: `0.5s -> 1s -> 2s`
- Timeout moi request: `requestTimeoutSec`
- Khong loop chunks ben trong 1 Code node

## OUTPUT + EXAMPLE

Output JSON chinh:
- `status`: `success|partialFailed|failed`
- `audioBinaryKey`: `joinedWav`
- `sampleRate=24000`, `channels=1`, `pcmFormat=s16le`
- `chunksTotal`, `chunksSuccess`, `failedChunkIndexes`
- `totalDurationSec`, `firstAudioLatencyMs`, `items`, `errorReason`

Example input:
`{ text, mode: "fullText", batchSize: 2, retry: 2 }`
